data.body: Adversarial review: 8 findings, 7 accepted, 1 rejected. Full exchange: null (artifact persistence not available in non-interactive mode). Key findings applied: S1 scope expanded (test-session-misc-no-jq.sh), legacy path dual-read during migration, S5 reordered to depend on S1 only (not S2/S3/S4), annotation-driven boundary check, source guard pattern for S2, return-semantics note for S4.
